Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_excel\('dashboard/trainee_performance_sample.xlsx'\)
print\('Shape:', df.shape\)
print\('Columns:', list\(df.columns\)\)
print\(\)
print\('Unique trainees:', sorted\(df['Name'].unique\(\)\)\)
print\(\)
print\(df.head\(2\).to_string\(\)\)
")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_excel\('dashboard/trainee_performance_sample.xlsx'\)
print\('Excel columns \(28 expected\):', len\(df.columns\)\)
print\('Step columns present:'\)
for s in range\(1, 13\):
    a = f'Step {s} Appraisal' in df.columns
    t = f'Step {s} Time' in df.columns
    print\(f'  Step {s}: Appraisal={a}, Time={t}'\)
print\(\)
print\('Sample row error count:', df.iloc[0]['Number of errors']\)
print\('Sample row completion time:', df.iloc[0]['Completion Time \(mins\)']\)
")
